title: Rebrand landing showcase to DOI AI platform
request: Rename showcase.html to index.html and update the first landing section from LandingHub showcase copy to DOI AI spatial information platform copy, including logo sizing, hero search messaging, platform metrics, and a white-default dark mode toggle. Do not modify sections below the requested first-screen/metrics area.
success_criteria: The visible brand changes from LandingHub to DOI AI in the requested header/logo area.
The SHOWCASE PLATFORM subtitle is removed and the logo image uses logo.svg with alt text updated for DOI AI and smaller height.
The hero headline and search prompt communicate address search for drone aerial imagery and 3D modeled buildings.
The first metric row is changed to platform-appropriate values such as registered addresses, 3D modeled buildings, free cost, and first data area.
A top-right dark mode toggle is available, defaults to the white theme, and only affects the index.html page.
Sections below the requested first-screen/metrics area are not intentionally changed.

positive: Follow the existing single-file HTML/CSS/JS style where practical.
Keep the change scoped to public/index.html and public/logo.svg if the logo asset itself needs rebranding.
negative: Do not include secrets or environment values.
Do not refactor unrelated sections below the requested area.
Do not modify backend or deployment settings unless required for the rename.
